creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 258694
Hardcode CORB and RIRB to 256

I am not sure what the problem is, but could you try this hacky patch to at least see if it goes any further when we hardcode CORB and RIRB?

You will have to apply the patch, recompile snd_hda(4) (or the whole kernel if you have snd_hda(4) built-into it), and reboot.
